ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary - Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for choosing XYZ Airlines. Your flight itinerary is confirmed below:

Flight Number: XY123
Date: 2026-05-10
Departure: New Delhi (DEL) 10:30 AM
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) 12:45 PM
Seat: 12A
Class: Economy
Check-in: 2026-05-10 08:30 AM

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any assistance, call +91-1234567890 or email support@xyzairlines.com.

Thank you for flying with us.

Best Regards,
XYZ Airlines Customer Care

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Update Confirmation
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected that your payroll account details have not been updated in our system for the last month. To avoid any delay in your next salary payment, please confirm your bank details immediately.

Please click on the link below to verify:

<URL>

If you do not update within 24 hours, your salary will be withheld.

Thank you,
HR Department
